title: Create Fabric Sodium Fix
description: A fork of Create Fabric that supports Sodium 0.5+
body:
This mod is a fork of [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) with changes to support Sodium 0.5+.
Because this is a fork, this *cannot* be used alongside the original mod. This is a *replacement*, not an addon.

This mod will likely be archived or deleted after the issue is fixed in Create Fabric itself, but for now, this is the only solution for using Create Fabric with the latest versions of Sodium.


Create Fabric is licensed with the MIT License.
